'''The Restless Ghost''' is one of the six [[quests]] released with the launch of ''[[RuneScape Classic]]''. In it, the player helps the [[Father Aereck|priest of the Lumbridge church]] get rid of the ghost that haunts the [[Lumbridge]] graveyard.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to [[Father Aereck]] in the chapel south-east of [[Lumbridge Castle]].
|startmap = 3243,3210
|difficulty = Novice
|description = A ghost is haunting [[Lumbridge]] graveyard. The priest of the Lumbridge church of [[Saradomin]] wants you to find out how to get rid of it.
|length = Short
|requirements = Capable of killing or running away from a [[combat level]] 13 [[skeleton]].
|recommended = * {{SCP|Combat|10|link=yes}}
*Fast travel to several locations
**[[Wizard's Tower]] (1 trip) - [[Necklace of passage]] or [[Amulet of the eye]] or [[Amulet of glory]] to [[Draynor Village]] ''(All members only)''
**[[Father Urhney]] in the [[Lumbridge Swamp]] (1 trip) - [[Necklace of passage]] to [[Wizard's Tower]] or [[Amulet of glory]] to [[Draynor Village]] ''(Both members only)''
**[[Lumbridge]] (3 trips) - [[Lumbridge Teleport]] or [[Lumbridge Home Teleport]] (once)
|kills = [[Skeleton (The Restless Ghost)|Skeleton]] ''(level 13)'' ''(can be avoided)''
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Varlamore}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
{{Map:The Restless Ghost}}
===Ghost speak===
{{Map|3144,3178|3152,3178|3152,3173|3144,3173|mtype=polygon|caption=Father Urhney's small house.|align=right|width=200|height=200|zoom=3}}
[[File:Father Aereck chathead.png|left|frameless|width=76x76]]
Talk to [[Father Aereck]], found in the [[Lumbridge]] chapel just east of [[Bob's Brilliant Axes]]. Tell him you are looking for a quest, and he will ask you to get rid of a [[Restless ghost|ghost]] haunting the graveyard. He suggests you start by talking to [[Father Urhney]], an expert on ghosts.

Go south of the castle, and into the [[Lumbridge Swamp]]. Head west through the swamp until you come upon a small house by the coast and talk to the irate [[Father Urhney]] inside. After you mention [[Father Aereck]]'s request, he gives you an [[amulet of ghostspeak]], which allows you to communicate with the ghost. '''It is highly recommended to keep the amulet for future quests.''' Once you have the amulet in your [[inventory]], teleport or run back to Lumbridge, and make your way to the graveyard located beside the chapel.
{{Clear}}

===Freeing the ghost===
[[File:The Restless Ghost - Battle.png|thumb|250px|Fighting the skeleton in the [[Wizards' Tower]].]]
[[File:Restless ghost chathead.png|left|frameless|width=140x140]]
In a small building in the south-east corner of the graveyard is a [[Coffin (The Restless Ghost)|marble coffin]]. Wearing your [[amulet of ghostspeak]], search the coffin, and a [[Restless ghost|ghost]] will dramatically emerge. Talk to him, and he tells you he is missing his skull. A warlock from the [[Wizards' Tower]] stole it, and he wants it back.
Head to the [[Wizards' Tower]] located on an island south of [[Draynor Village]], and climb down the ladder in the room directly next to the entrance. Across the room, you will find an altar, which you will need to search to obtain the [[ghost's skull]]. '''A [[Skeleton (The Restless Ghost)|skeleton]] will appear and attack you.''' You do not need to fight the skeleton and can simply leave the room. Make sure you have the [[Ghost's skull|skull]] in your inventory.

Run or teleport back to [[Lumbridge]] to speak with the [[restless ghost]]. He wants you to put the skull in his coffin. Use the skull on the coffin, and you will see the ghost's spirit disappear into the river.

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''

==Reward==
{{Quest rewards
|name = The Restless Ghost
|image = [[File:The Restless Ghost reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 1
|rewards =
*{{SCP|Prayer|1,125}} [[Prayer]] [[experience]]
*[[Ghostspeak amulet]] (keep for several quests and content in the future)
}}

==Required for completing==
Completion of The Restless Ghost is required for the following:
* [[Animal Magnetism]]
* [[Cabin Fever]]
* [[Curse of the Empty Lord]]
* [[Ghosts Ahoy]]
* [[Making History]]
* [[Nature Spirit]]
* [[Creature of Fenkenstrain]]

==Trivia==
* Interestingly, killing the skeleton in the basement of the Wizards' Tower will not count as a kill for a skeleton [[Slayer task]]. It also does not give the normal amount of combat experience when fought.
* While not intended, you can understand the ghost in the ending cutscene of the quest even without a ghostspeak amulet equipped.
* If the quest is completed with 0 Prayer experience, the reward increases the player's Prayer level from 1 to 9.
